name: eMoney Advisor Financial Planning API
what_it_does: eMoney Advisor financial planning REST API for comprehensive financial planning, account aggregation, client portal, and advisor workflow automation. Enables AI agents to manage client financial plan creation and interactive cash flow modeling for advisor planning automation, handle account aggregation from 10,000+ institutions for unified client financial picture, access goals-based planning and retirement income projection for retirement planning automation, retrieve estate planning and wealth transfer scenario analysis for estate planning workflow, manage client portal data and collaborative planning for advisor-client engagement, handle tax planning and Roth conversion analysis for tax-efficient retirement strategy, access insurance need analysis and protection planning for comprehensive financial plan, retrieve interactive financial dashboard and client-facing analytics for planning engagement, manage planning data integration with portfolio management and CRM for unified advisor workflow, and integrate eMoney with Fidelity, custodians, and major wealthtech platforms.
use_cases: Creating comprehensive financial plans from advisor planning agents
Aggregating client accounts from data gathering agents
Projecting retirement income from retirement planning agents
Modeling tax strategy from tax planning agents
not_for: Consumer financial planning without advisor intermediary
Institutional investment management without retail planning
Simple portfolio management without comprehensive planning
best_when: An RIA or wealth management firm using eMoney Advisor wanting AI agents to automate financial plan creation, account aggregation, retirement projection, client portal engagement, and planning workflow.
avoid_when: INVESTMENT ADVICE FIDUCIARY SUPERVISION: Automated financial plan generation constitutes investment advice requiring licensed IAR supervision before client delivery; unsupervised automated plan delivery creates SEC fiduciary violation. Account aggregation data accuracy — automated eMoney account aggregation relies on screen-scraping and API connections that may have data quality issues; automated financial plans built on inaccurate aggregated data create financial planning errors. GLBA NPI in aggregated financial data — aggregated client account data across 10,000+ institutions contains extensive NPI; automated data sharing or integration beyond disclosed use creates GLBA Safeguards Rule violation. Fidelity ecosystem dependency — eMoney acquired by Fidelity (2015); deep Fidelity ecosystem integration creates platform dependency; automated workflows leveraging Fidelity-specific integrations create single-vendor risk.

auth.notes: eMoney Advisor uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Radnor, Pennsylvania HQ. Founded 2000. Acquired by Fidelity Investments (2015). Fidelity subsidiary. 100,000+ financial advisor users. $4T+ in planning assets. Account aggregation (10,000+ institutions). Competes with MoneyGuidePro (Envestnet) and RightCapital for financial planning software.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-advisor annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-advisor annual subscription; planning and aggregation modules
pricing.notes: Radnor, Pennsylvania. Fidelity Investments subsidiary (acquired 2015). Founded 2000. 100,000+ advisor users. $4T+ in planning assets.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; account aggregation refresh may be async

known_agent_gotchas: SEC IAR SUPERVISION FOR PLAN DELIVERY: Automated financial plan generation and delivery to clients requires licensed Investment Adviser Representative review; automated plan delivery without supervision constitutes unsupervised investment advice

Account aggregation data quality — eMoney account aggregation uses screen-scraping and OAuth connections that break when financial institution websites change; automated financial plans built on stale or failed aggregation data create planning inaccuracies
No webhooks — plan calculation completion and aggregation refresh events require polling; no push notification for planning event completion

Fidelity ecosystem dependency — eMoney deep integration with Fidelity custody creates Fidelity-centric workflow advantages but non-Fidelity custodian integrations may have reduced functionality; verify non-Fidelity custodian API capabilities

Tax projection assumptions — automated tax projections use simplified tax model; automated Roth conversion recommendations based on eMoney projections must be validated by CPA; eMoney is not a tax advice platform

Interactive planning collaboration — eMoney's strength is interactive client-facing planning; automated backend plan generation without client-facing review may underutilize platform capabilities designed for collaborative financial planning
agent_readiness.security_notes: Financial planning. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Client financial plan and aggregated account data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial planning. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Client financial plan and NPI data.
